summary: Comprehensive testing of ApnaGhr Visit Platform new features - Neo-Brutalist UI redesign, Packers & Movers module, and Advertise With Us module. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features working after fixing routing bug.

minor.issue: Pydantic validation error for Optional fields (video_url, target_url) - FIXED by adding Optional type hints

ui_bugs.issue: Users with 'advertiser' role were being redirected to login instead of customer home - FIXED by adding 'advertiser' to allowedRoles

issues: Some property images show broken image placeholder (house for rent in bathinda) - image URLs may be invalid

critical_code_review_comments: The advertising.py model had non-Optional fields with None defaults which caused Pydantic validation errors - fixed
App.js routing didn't account for 'advertiser' role which is assigned when customer creates advertiser profile - fixed
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed data created during backend tests (shifting bookings, advertiser profiles, advertisements)
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Login page with Neo-Brutalist design and animations - working, 2) Customer home with Packers & Advertise service cards, animated marquee, HOT badges, view counts - working, 3) Packers & Movers page with 5 packages (Basic, Standard, Premium, Elite, Intercity) and booking form - working, 4) Advertise With Us page with 4 packages (Starter, Growth, Premium, Elite) and multi-step form - working. Backend APIs all functional. Fixed routing bug where 'advertiser' role users couldn't access customer pages.

features_tested.login_page_design: PASS - Neo-Brutalist design with animations, demo credentials section
features_tested.customer_home_services: PASS - Packers & Advertise cards visible and clickable
features_tested.property_cards_hot_badges: PASS - HOT badges and weekly view counts displayed
features_tested.animated_marquee: PASS - Scrolling banner with service names
features_tested.floating_bottom_nav: PASS - Home, My Visits, Cart, Profile tabs
features_tested.packers_page_ui: PASS - All 5 packages displayed with booking form
features_tested.advertising_page_ui: PASS - All 4 packages displayed with multi-step form

bugs_fixed.issue: Pydantic validation error in Advertisement model
bugs_fixed.root_cause: video_url and target_url fields were typed as 'str = None' instead of 'Optional[str] = None'

bugs_fixed.issue: Advertiser role users redirected to login instead of customer home
bugs_fixed.root_cause: App.js routing only allowed 'customer' role for customer pages, but creating advertiser profile changes role to 'advertiser'
bugs_fixed.fix_applied: Added 'advertiser' to allowedRoles for all customer routes
